summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Routed the one security-sensitive PR to central security handling and kept the remaining PRs open for independent maintainer or author follow-up; no close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR-creation action is planned.
